incident.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
The id "`tvRoleLabel`" is not referring to any views in this layout
A newer version of com.android.application than 8.7.3 is available: 9.2.1
A newer version of com.google.android.gms:play-services-auth than 21.3.0 is available: 21.5.1
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.15.0 is available: 1.18.0
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.2.1 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.6.1 is available: 3.7.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.7.0 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.12.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity than 1.9.3 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.2.0 is available: 2.2.1
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-fragment-ktx than 2.8.5 is available: 2.9.8
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-ui-ktx than 2.8.5 is available: 2.9.8
A newer version of androidx.room:room-compiler than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-ktx than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-runtime than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-livedata-ktx than 2.8.7 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-ktx than 2.8.7 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of com.google.firebase:firebase-bom than 33.7.0 is available: 34.13.0
A newer version of com.google.gms.google-services than 4.4.2 is available: 4.4.4
"Autor" is a common misspelling; did you mean "Author"?
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable

This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This library supports using KSP instead of kapt, which greatly improves performance. Learn more: https://developer.android.com/studio/build/migrate-to-ksp

show-url.description: Learn about how to enable KSP and use the KSP processor for this dependency instead

incident.message: Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/white` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.BookApp`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/white` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.BookApp`)

incident.message: Use version catalog instead

String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
